notes: Big structural restructure of the per-board UI (mockup work made real). Masthead pared down to identity (no more bare-hostname duplicate, no more loud white FW CHECK NOW). Healthy banner hides itself when there's nothing wrong. Landing card consolidates encoder cluster + sensitivity + speaker pairing + three big buttons (Change speaker, Identify, Run setup). Advanced section gets a knob-activity practice readout + mobile-first tap-to-edit gesture editor. Gesture engine extended: new h+1c through h+5c (hold then click) family + 5c+h. Action picker dims actions already mapped to other gestures; shows inline descriptions for the modes (knob → bass / treble / volume) and for Loudness boost so installers know what they do. Wizard auto-launches on fresh boards (setupComplete=false). Visual polish pass for the new structure is queued for design Claude — this release is the structural skeleton on real hardware.
